texto: I can't be a hypocrite as a coach because as a player that's what I wanted. I wanted feedback, I wanted communication from the boss. I showed up for work, you can yell at me if you want, but I want input. So that's the kind of coach I want to be.
explicacao: Citação de Adam Oates sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “I can't be a hypocrite as a coach because as a player that's what I wanted. I wanted feedback, I …” articula trabalho, work, boss em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e boss.

frase_original: I can't be a hypocrite as a coach because as a player that's what I wanted. I wanted feedback, I wanted communication from the boss. I showed up for work, you can yell at me if you want, but I want input. So that's the kind of coach I want to be.
